Crypto Arbitrage: A Quick Way to Profit from Price Differences

For successful arbitrage, choose multiple exchanges with varying asset prices and use a scanner to find profitable deals. Consider fees and transaction speed. After purchasing cryptocurrency, transfer it to an exchange with a higher price, sell it, and lock in your profit.

Frequently asked questions

How are prices for various cryptocurrencies determined?

Please consult the Market Data section of our methodology for comprehensive details on this topic.

What is the difference between 'Circulating Supply,' 'Total Supply,' and 'Max Supply'?

Circulating Supply estimates the number of coins currently available in the market and held by the public. Total Supply represents the total number of coins currently in existence, excluding any that have been permanently removed from circulation. Max Supply indicates the estimated maximum number of coins that will ever be created throughout the cryptocurrency’s lifespan.

What distinguishes a 'Coin' from a 'Token' on the site?

A Coin is a standalone cryptocurrency that functions on its own blockchain. A Token, however, relies on another cryptocurrency’s blockchain to operate. For a list of tokens and their associated platforms, see our crypto tokens listings.

About us

Discover the premier service for monitoring cryptocurrency exchanges, offering you a comprehensive solution to stay ahead in the dynamic world of digital asset trading. Our platform delivers real-time data, detailed analysis, and intuitive tools to help you make well-informed decisions in the fast-moving crypto market.

Who We Are

SpreadHunt develops advanced cryptocurrency price monitoring technologies for arbitrage trading. Our algorithms analyze prices across multiple exchanges in real-time, helping traders find the best deals. We consider fees, liquidity, and transaction speed.

Real-Time Data

Stay on top of the market with instant updates on cryptocurrency prices across various exchanges. Our service provides you with the latest price fluctuations, volume changes, and market trends to ensure you are always informed.

Extensive Exchange Coverage

We monitor all major cryptocurrency exchanges, giving you a broad view to compare prices, fees, and trading volumes across different platforms. This allows you to identify the best opportunities to trade digital assets efficiently.

Custom Alerts

Configure personalized alerts to get notifications about key market movements, price changes, or specific trading conditions. Whether you’re a casual trader or a seasoned investor, our alert system keeps you updated and ready to act swiftly.

Historical Data and Insights

Gain access to detailed historical data and powerful analysis tools to track cryptocurrency performance over time. Our charts and analytical reports provide insights into long-term trends, helping you make informed decisions for your investment strategy.

User-Friendly Design

Our platform features an intuitive, user-friendly design that makes it easy for traders of all levels to navigate and use our services effectively. Personalize your dashboard to showcase the information that matters most to you.

Address: 3Commas  Ltd.: 35-37 Liverpool Street, London, EC2M 7PP, United Kingdom.
